description:
- v3.4.32: Clean up MIGRATIONS.md after skip-version migration test: remove test entries for _test_col_1 and _test_col_2. Test columns remain in DB as harmless artifacts (SQLite DROP COLUMN requires 3.35+).
- v3.4.33: Release Manager now updates GitHub Wiki Changelog.md on publish: prepends a new entry with version, date, and release description. Non-fatal — wiki failure does not block the release.
